## 🧪 Type of change

<!-- Mark the appropriate option with an [x] (no spaces around the x) -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💄 UI/Style update (visual improvements)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactor
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change
- [ ] 🧪 Test addition

## ✅ Checklist

<!-- Mark the appropriate option with an [x] (no spaces around the x) -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I've tested on Chrome, Firefox, and Safari
- [ ] I've tested on mobile (320px) and desktop (1920px)
- [ ] I've updated the README if needed
- [ ] I've added/updated tests if applicable
- [ ] No new console errors or warnings
- [ ] Changes are responsive and accessible
- [ ] I've run `npm run lint` (if applicable)

> 💡 **Tip for co-authors**: To add a co-author to this commit, include the following in your commit message:
>
> ```
> Co-authored-by: Name <name@example.com>
> ```
>
> This helps unlock the **Pair Extraordinaire** GitHub achievement badge!
